title: Visual Agentic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Large Vision-Language Models

defines.name: Visual-ARFT
defines.definition: A reinforcement fine-tuning framework that equips large vision-language models with multimodal agentic reasoning and tool-use abilities through verifiable rewards.

defines.name: MAT
defines.definition: A multimodal agentic tool benchmark for evaluating LVLMs on search and coding-based agentic tasks.

problem: Existing agentic reinforcement fine-tuning methods are largely limited to language-only settings and do not adequately teach LVLMs to think with images and use tools in multimodal tasks.
